title: Ternary UNet submission (PR #640) folder is in track_10min_16mb instead of track_non_record_16mb
body:
PR #640 placed the 73.7M Ternary UNet folder under `records/track_10min_16mb/`, 
but the README accepted it as a Notable Non-Record Run (not in the main leaderboard). 
Non-record submissions should live in `records/track_non_record_16mb/`.
